prestazioni: FA24F 2.4L turbocharged flat-four engine: Full bolt-on Cobb Accessport Stage 2+ tune with E85 flex-fuel mapping (30-40% ethanol blend) targeting 320-340 whp and 380-400 lb-ft torque, utilizing a Grimmspeed 3-port boost control solenoid and Cobb SF intake with a custom heat-shielded silicone coupler for optimized airflow under the STI Sport’s unique hood scoop design

Forced induction upgrade: Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) paired with a Tomei 8.5mm head gasket and ARP head studs to handle 28-30 psi peak boost, with a custom 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 70mm titanium cat-back and a Catted J-pipe (200-cell GESI catalytic converter) for emissions compliance without sacrificing flow

Suspension and drivetrain: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for the VA chassis) with 24mm front and 22mm rear Whiteline adjustable sway bars, paired with Cusco 2-way LSD (1.5/2.0) and a STI-spec rear subframe reinforcement kit to eliminate flex under hard launches, complemented by DCCD Pro tuning via Cobb’s Accessport for aggressive front-bias torque split (60/40) in manual mode
estetica: Aerodynamics: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (VA chassis-specific) with carbon fiber front canards, rear diffuser, and a custom 3D-printed STI Sport grille insert (blacked-out with red STI emblem), paired with a Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,200mm chord, 200mm height) for balanced downforce at 120+ mph

Wheels and stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (18x9.5 +38 front, 18x10.5 +42 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), utilizing a custom fender roll and pull with -2.5° front camber and -2.0° rear camber for aggressive flush fitment

Exterior accents: STI Sport-specific carbon fiber lip spoiler (OEM-style but lightweight), custom matte gunmetal vinyl wrap with red pinstriping (3M 2080 series), and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (functional scoop delete for improved aerodynamics) with a custom red STI badge overlay, paired with Morimoto XB LED headlights (black housing) and a custom rear bumper diffuser insert with integrated LED reverse lights
